scenario_description: In this scenario, Alice can clue rank 1 to Bob as a 2 for 1 clue. But thinking ahead, she could clue blue to Cathy, which would setup Bob to clue Yellow to Cathy, grabbing another three cards with one clue. Possibly, Donald will clue rank 4 to Bob to perform a very efficient prompt. This line should be preferred over the rank 1 clue
